task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a custom Activity Profile named 'SAR-ATV'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Activity Profile dropdown or Manage Profiles dialog in the application (Garmin BaseCamp) displays the newly created profile named 'SAR-ATV'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'SAR-ATV' profile is configured with a 'Shorter Distance' route preference.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The routing preferences or options menu for the 'SAR-ATV' profile shows the calculation method or route preference set to 'Shorter Distance'.

task_completion.description: Verify a route is drawn within the Middlesex Fells Reservation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view shows a route line drawn over an area labeled or visually identifiable as the Middlesex Fells Reservation.

task_completion.description: Verify the drawn route consists of at least three distinct points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route properties window, list view, or map view clearly shows at least 3 distinct waypoints, via-points, or nodes making up the drawn route.

task_completion.description: Verify the route is exported as a GPX file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, save prompt, or file explorer window showing the file being saved as 'sar_patrol_route.gpx' (with GPX format selected) in the 'C:\workspace\' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Garmin BaseCamp application interface being actively used, rather than a terminal, command prompt, or text editor generating the GPX file.

integrity.description: Verify the route was manually drawn in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The route creation tool (e.g., 'New Route' or drawing tool) should be visibly active in the map view, rather than an existing GPX file simply being imported.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by writing the GPX file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) or scripts open with GPX/XML code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected activity profile name is exactly 'SAR-ATV'. The route must contain a minimum of 3 distinct points. The final exported file must be saved to 'C:\workspace\sar_patrol_route.gpx'.
